phases.name: Write security benchmark loader test
phases.reasoning: Write test_security_benchmarks_load in src/cmd/autoresearch/benchmarks.rs that asserts BenchmarkSuite::load returns 5 cases with correct names and non-empty fields. This test will fail (red) until the benchmark files are created. Must read benchmarks.rs first to understand existing test module structure and BenchmarkSuite/BenchmarkCase types.

phases.name: Create all 5 security benchmark cases
phases.reasoning: Create 15 files across 5 directories: toctou-race, missing-transaction, production-unwraps, vulnerable-dependencies, command-injection. Each gets code.rs (buggy Rust code), context.md (runtime context description), and expected.json (must_find/must_not_flag arrays). Code for first 3 cases is extracted from real git history commits (d9fcb61, 0c90928, 7272cee). Cases 4-5 are synthetic. All expected.json must be valid JSON with consistent location format. After creating files, validate JSON with python3 -m json.tool and run the test from phase 01 to go green.
